user_query: I want to create a news aggregator app that provides Greek news in English.

TaskList.description: Research and identify the API that can fetch news articles specifically from the source 'ktg'.
Research and identify the API that retrieves news articles from all available sources.
Implement the API to fetch news articles from 'ktg' using the chosen API.
Implement the API to fetch news articles from all available sources using the chosen API.
Compile and format the news articles from both sources into a user-friendly layout for the app.
Test the app to ensure it aggregates news correctly from both the specific and all sources.
